consumer-cards.notes: ECB reports 40.1B card txns in H1 2024 (+10.3%) and 44.3B in H2 2024 (+11.3%), totalling 84.4B for full year 2024. Cards account for 57% of euro area non-cash payment transactions. National schemes (Girocard ~7.5B, Carte Bancaire ~13B est.) are significant but co-branded with Visa/MC for cross-border. EU-27 figure includes non-euro area EU members.

bank-transfers.notes: ECB reports 15.7B credit transfers in H1 2024 (+6.5%) and est. 16.8B in H2 2024, plus ~1B SCT Inst. Full year 2024 credit transfers ~33.5B. SCT Inst represented ~19% of all credit transfers in 2024, growing rapidly. TIPS settled 1.35B instant payment transactions in 2024 (+402% YoY). Instant Payments Regulation (IPR) adopted March 2024 mandates PSP participation from Oct 2025.

direct-debits.notes: ECB reports 11.1B direct debits in H1 2024 (+4.4%) and est. 11.1B in H2 2024. Full year ~22.2B. Direct debits account for 14% of euro area non-cash transactions. Heavily used for utility bills, subscriptions, insurance, rent. Germany, France, and Netherlands are top DD markets. De-duplicated: overlaps with bill-payments category.

key_systems: National wallets (Swish SE, MobilePay DK, Twint CH-adjacent)
digital-wallets.notes: E-money payments accounted for 6% of euro area non-cash transactions in H1 2025. Digital wallets captured 14% of POS and 33% of online payments in 2024. EU mobile wallet transaction volume growing ~22% annually. Most EU wallet transactions are card-funded (NFC tap), creating overlap with consumer-cards. De-duplicated: only incremental wallet-only transactions counted.

sources.citation: Mordor Intelligence — Europe Mobile Payments Market

etd.notes: Eurex traded 2,080.5M contracts in 2024 (+9% YoY): interest rate derivatives 972.2M (+26%), equity derivatives 312.6M (+16%), index derivatives 784.6M (-10%). Euronext derivatives ADV ~620K lots, est. ~155M contracts/year. Combined EU ETD ~2.55B contracts. TPS calculated using 252 trading days x 21.6h weighted hours. EU is ~1.2% of global ETD by contract count due to India's dominance.

key_systems: Euronext (Paris, Amsterdam, Brussels, Lisbon, Dublin, Milan, Oslo)
equity-markets.notes: Euronext ADV €10.4B with 64.8% market share. Xetra order book turnover €1.3T in 2024. Euronext cleared 234.8M share contracts in 2024 (+181%). Combined EU exchanges est. ~6.8B equity trades. Europe's equity market is fragmented across many venues including MTFs (CBOE Europe, Aquis, Turquoise). EU combined market cap ~$15T (~13% of global).

interbank-rtgs.notes: T2 settled 108M transactions in 2024 (+3.6% YoY), a record since the euro's introduction. Total value €463.7T (-4.7%). T2 processes the highest-value payments in Europe: average transaction ~€4.3M. T2 replaced TARGET2 in March 2023. Low TPS but massive economic significance per transaction.

securities-settlement.notes: T2S settled 202.6M transactions in 2024 (+14% YoY), value €248.9T (+24%). T2S connects 24 CSDs across 23 markets. Euroclear processed 243M transactions in first 9 months of 2024 alone (€850T value, +5% YoY), with €40T assets under custody. Clearstream is the other major ICSD. Combined EU securities settlement likely ~500M+ transactions/year.

government-payments.notes: EU total social protection expenditure €4,925B in 2024 (+6.9% YoY), representing 27.3% of GDP. 64.7% paid in cash transfers. Old age pensions €2,044B (41.5% of total). Estimated ~10B+ annual government payment transactions across EU-27 member states (pensions, unemployment, child benefits, healthcare reimbursements, tax refunds). Most flow through SEPA credit transfer rails.

sources.citation: Eurostat — 64.7% of social benefits paid in cash

atm-withdrawals.notes: Euro area had ~253.7K ATMs at end of 2024 (-3.1% YoY). Estimated ~5B annual ATM withdrawals across EU-27 (extrapolating from 5.4B in euro area 2022, adjusted for declining trend). ATM count and usage declining as card/digital payments grow, but cash remains significant in Germany, Austria, Spain, and southern Europe.

bill-payments.notes: 66% of euro area consumers pay telephone/internet bills, 61% utility bills, 42% insurance via recurring payments. Most EU bill payments flow through SEPA Direct Debit (~22B/year) or credit transfers. Heavy overlap with direct-debits category. De-duplicated: bill payments counted under direct-debits for TPS calculation.

cex.notes: Bitvavo held ~50% of EUR-denominated spot trading volume in 2024. Bitvavo and Kraken each had ~€25-26B in annual EUR volumes in 2023, growing in 2024. MiCA fully enforceable since Dec 2024: 65%+ of EU crypto businesses compliant by Q1 2025. Over 90% of EU exchanges updated KYC/AML. Crypto derivatives trading volumes rose 28% under MiCA. EU is establishing itself as the most regulated crypto market globally.

sources.citation: Kaiko — State of the European Crypto Market

gaming-microtx.notes: European gaming market worth ~$100B in 2024. Mobile gaming 52.1% of revenue. In-app purchases generated ~€12B in 2022, growing ~14% annually. Gaming entertainment spending in Europe grew 16.7% YoY in 2024 (Visa). UK holds 29.1% of European gaming market. Estimated ~1.9B annual microtransactions across EU-27.

sources.citation: Market Data Forecast — Europe Gaming Market
Market Data Forecast — Europe Mobile Games Market

commodities.notes: Euronext commodity derivatives ADV 116,328 lots (+28% YoY). EEX is Europe's leading energy exchange. EU commodity derivatives are relatively small vs. CME/ICE US or MCX India. Euronext commodity growth driven by agricultural and power futures. TPS calculated using 252 trading days.

de_duplicated_eu_tps.methodology: Sum of de-duplicated contributions: Consumer Cards (5,340 — dominant payment method) + Bank Transfers (3,190 — SEPA credit transfers including SCT Inst) + Direct Debits (1,410 — SEPA DD, counted separately from bank transfers) + Digital Wallets (incremental ~290, most wallet txns are card-funded NFC) + ETD (870) + Equity Markets (390) + Government Payments (incremental ~120, ~60% flows through existing SEPA rails) + ATM Withdrawals (160, zero overlap) + Securities Settlement (10) + Interbank RTGS (5) + CEX (45) + Gaming (incremental ~30) + Commodities (15). Bill payments excluded (>90% on SEPA DD rails already counted). Adjusted total after overlap: ~14,500 gross, ~13,400 de-duplicated.
de_duplicated_eu_tps.notes: Range reflects uncertainty in non-euro EU member state volumes (Poland, Romania, Sweden, etc.), fragmented exchange venue attribution, and wallet-card overlap estimation. Euro area accounts for ~85% of EU-27 payment volume.

confidence.notes: ECB publishes comprehensive semi-annual payment statistics with high granularity. TARGET Services Annual Report 2024 provides exact T2/T2S/TIPS figures. Eurex and Euronext publish detailed trading statistics. Weakest areas: fragmented equity market data across many venues/MTFs, non-euro EU member state data lags, and digital wallet/gaming transaction counts are estimated. MiCA crypto data still emerging.
